welcome.message:
Hello 👋 Welcome to the Lead Qualification Assistant.
I'd like to understand your requirements so our team can assist you better.

buttons.text: I want to know about your services
I want to talk to sales

node_1772797747753.message: Great! To help us understand your needs better, could you briefly tell us what type of service or solution you're looking for?

buttons.text: Yes, I can share my requirement

node_1772797926395.message: Sure! Before connecting you with our sales team, could you please share your company name or business email so we can assist you better?

node_1772798101438.message: Thank you for your time. If you need any help in the future, feel free to reach out.

node_1772798142957.message: No problem! Whenever you're ready, feel free to come back and we’ll be happy to assist you.

node_1772798289304.message: Thank you for sharing your details. Our sales team will review your requirements and contact you shortly.

fallback.message: Sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Could you please choose one of the options above?
